DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS AZUCENA MENDOZA RUIZ, MIRIAM GONZALEZ, REYNALDO LOPEZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCO RESPONSE TO DEFT GENENTECH, INC. IS DENIED. THE COURT ORDERED THIS CASE STAYED FOR COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION ON JANUARY 26, 2022. DEFENDANT GENENTECH WAS NOT EXCEPTED FROM THE EFFECT OF THAT ORDER AND IS NOT REQUIRED TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY IN THE CIVIL ACTION WHILE THE STAY IS IN FORCE. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 AND E-MAIL IT TO JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES FLEMING AT JAMESHFLEMING@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Jul-14-2023 Continued To Jan-24-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Disco Response To Deft Genentech, Inc.
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS AZUCENA MENDOZA RUIZ, MIRIAM GONZALEZ, REYNALDO LOPEZ'S Motion To Compel Disco Response To Deft Genentech, Inc.

Plaintiffs' motion to compel discovery from defendant Genentech is denied. The Court ordered this case stayed for completion of arbitration on January 26, 2022. Defendant Genentech was not excepted from the effect of that order and is not required to respond to discovery in the civil action while the stay is in force.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and e-mail it to Judge Pro Tem James Fleming at jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

PLAINTIFF AZUCENA MENDOZA RUIZ, MIRIAM GONZALEZ, REYNALDO LOPEZ MOTION TO COMPEL DISCO RESPONSE TO DEFT GENENTECH, INC.(TENTATIVE RULING PURPOSES ONLY PART 2 OF 2)
